title: Never Journey
description: This mod adds new Armor tool's and weapon's into the game with completely new biome Called the uranium wasteland and some Advancements
body:
This mod adds new Armor tool's and weapon's into the game with completely new biome Called the uranium wasteland and some Advancements

Recommended to use Jei When playing

Crafting for the Emerald tools and Armor Recipe's
![Emerald Tool's and Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36b6f24af662b683b46636435f1e975bf031a8f6.png)

Crafting for the Amethyst tools and Armor Recipe's
![Amethyst tools and Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b139492b4cf0ffffbe9328b631507ffea1297876.png)

Crafting for the PurpleGold tools and Armor Recipe's
![Purple Gold Armor Tool's And weapon's](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47044199b69f7528deab98fc490cbae9e5d69d45.png)

Crafting for the Titanium Tool's and Armor Recipe's
![Titanium Armor and Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba6ca28343bac51d72e76a65841e8eb1fb6f0f3f.png)
